---
title: "DRI not running on ATI Radeon 9600xt"
date: 2007-11-15
forum: Multimedia &amp; Video
---

### Post by paulhouser on 2007-11-15
Hiyo...I've searched and searched and searched for an answer to this problem but cant find any working solution. I just installed Gutsy today and the ATI drivers work almost awesome...but I can't get DRI running. I've got an ATI Radeon 9600XT with 256mb of mem. and here are the appropriate files/ outputs:

### Post by paulhouser on 2007-11-16
ALRIGHTY!!!!!
Here's how you do it for the 9600xt...
First, go into synaptic, search for fglrx, and remove EVERY PACKAGE that comes up. EVERY ONE.

Reboot - now be warned, it ain't gonna look pretty when it loads up again.
Now: follow these instructions verbatim:
[http://forlong.blogage.de/article/2007/10/23/fglrx-8423---finally-with-AIGLX-support#](http://forlong.blogage.de/article/2007/10/23/fglrx-8423---finally-with-AIGLX-support#)

Enable special desktop effects, TADA! It works!!!!!

Solution thanks to this post:
[http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?p=3729934&highlight=GLX_EXT_texture_from_pixmap#post3729934](http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?p=3729934&highlight=GLX_EXT_texture_from_pixmap#post3729934)

Now if I could only get Tribes to run through Wine...I'd be the happiest camper.
